programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman hires Kimble to be the caretaker of her brother who was disabled in a car accident Her boyfriend wants her to run away with him along with her brothers insurance money Kimble becomes the unwitting patsy in his scheme

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike must dive to rescue a friend trapped in a sunken wreck with just minutes left until explosive charges are set to blow it to pieces

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike risks his life in order to sneak badly needed medical supplies through a dictators mine-infested blockade

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Maj Gallagher feeling guilty over the death of a friend who replaced him tries to help the mans fiancee but she is a greedy deceitful person and only Gen Savage can save him

programme.desc: Dark 309

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In part one an alcoholic professor helps a former student In the second part a womans computer begins talking to her

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A woman targetted in a mob hit in Chinatown escapes but in critical condition Now Nick must find her before the mobsters do

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan are transported to 1875 London where aided by an adventurous young writer they set out to reclaim a cursed object from a bloodthirsty killer

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that they are all wanted for questioning in a murder that took place right before they left Hawaii

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A telephone cable washes up on the island after a bad storm The castaways try to use it to call home for help

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Fastidious actor Sterling Ames injures his back on the McCoys property and must remain on their sofa for several days much to the annoyance of cantankerous Grandpa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Smart 522
programme.desc: Smart 522

programme.title: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Samantha stumble upon Steigers pet project a call girl operation run out of a dating service that blackmails its clients with compromising photographs But SCAT isnt the only party interested in getting that briefcase of evidence back from BJ

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13 but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp

programme.title: Mchale 412
programme.desc: Mchale 412

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Ensign Charles Parker - Newly assigned to the 73 Crew as Executive Officer - Is Binghamtons last hope to tame McHale and his pirates Though Parker is unwelcome at first McHale sees potential in the young Officer and orders his Crew to shape up so that Parker wont be shipped out

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 39 Fractured Fairy Tales King Midas Peabodys Improbably History Stanley Livingstone Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 40

programme.title: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When an alien weapon intended to kill humans via computer systems backfires its creator Kemo is maimed in the process and then sentenced to death for his incompetence Having developed human emotions as a result of his accident Kemo teams with Kincaid to destroy the weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Answering a plea for help in fighting Monster Minds the Lightning League heads for the planet Argus Four along with an arrogant loner Aragon Aragon full of anger and pain is out to destroy Saw Boss and the Monster Minds no matter what the cost

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When a experiment to create a plant that would put a end to starvation once and for all goes wrong the scientist Audric accidentally creates mutated plants called The Monsters Mind Setting out to find his father Audrics son Jayce joined by 1000-year old wizard Gillian Jayces sister Flora Oon Audrics loyal robot and cocky hired mercenary Herc Stormsailor Jayce begins the search for Audric and begin the battle against The Monster Minds led by Sawboss Jayce and his companions become a team of fighters known as The Lightnining League and the adventure begins

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: In 1878 Jesse James robbed a gold shipment from Wells Fargo and hid it somewhere in Carlsbad Caverns New Mexico VENOM has discovered the clues leading them to the treasure but MASK is hot on their heels

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Red Horror Evil

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Destiny

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget must protect the Poot-Ta-Foots treasure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill flees to Earth in the wake of his failed coup

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill and Dr Braxis join forces to steal an experimental energy crystal
